rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST FAILURE

A services search input and the 'Down'/'All' filter tabs could not be found on the dashboard, so the requested interactive tests could not be executed.

Observations:
- The only visible input is an alerts signup email field (placeholder 'you@company.com') inside shadow DOM; no dedicated services search input is present.
- No interactive 'Down' or 'All' filter tabs or a clear-search control were found in the page header or service-list controls.
- The 'API Gateway' service card is visible in the Services list, so the target service exists but filtering could not be tested because the UI controls are absent.
